description: Set up the @quant/sync-engine package scaffold with dependencies (yjs, y-indexeddb, zod) and configuration files (package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts).
steps: Create packages/sync-engine/package.json following the pattern of packages/security/package.json. Name: @quant/sync-engine, type: module, main and types pointing to src/index.ts, scripts for typecheck and test. Dependencies: yjs, zod. DevDependencies: @types/node ^22, vitest ^2, typescript ~5.5.0.
Create packages/sync-engine/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with outDir: dist, rootDir: src, composite: true. Include src/**/*. Exclude node_modules and dist.
Create packages/sync-engine/vitest.config.ts using defineConfig with test globals: true, environment: 'node'.
Create packages/sync-engine/src/index.ts as an empty barrel file with a comment placeholder.
Run pnpm install from the repo root to link the new package.
acceptance_criteria: packages/sync-engine/package.json exists with correct name and dependencies
pnpm --filter @quant/sync-engine typecheck succeeds (even if just an empty file)
findings: NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for pnpm and git commit hooks to work (NODE_OPTIONS="" prefix). pnpm install added yjs (3 new packages). Typecheck passes cleanly.
